name: Grammar for card-mod CSS constructs in Home Assistant block scalars

patterns.comment: HA web component element names used as CSS selectors: ha-*, hui-*, mwc-*
patterns.name: entity.name.tag.css.ha-element.homeassistant

patterns.comment: CSS block delimiters -- single braces only, never Jinja delimiters {{ }} {% %} {# #}
patterns.name: punctuation.section.property-list.css.homeassistant

patterns.comment: CSS property names: lowercase-with-hyphens followed by colon (not :// or ::)
